events.title: Sunday Bhakti Kirtan with Akari Tamura
events.description: Akari Tamura — kirtan leader, multi-instrumentalist, and mantra teacher who relocated from Koh Phangan to Ubud — holds an intimate evening of devotional chanting at Sayuri Healing Food in Peliatan. The format is classic bhakti: live Sanskrit mantra chanting, sacred cacao, Bhakti stories, and community gathering. No singing experience needed — only an open heart. Distinct from Akari's bi-weekly Wednesday Kirtan: Songs of Love at Dragon Tea Temple, this is her Sunday anchor at one of Ubud's most beloved wellness venues.
events.short_description: Devotional chanting and sacred cacao with kirtan leader Akari Tamura, every Sunday at Sayuri Healing Food.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Ubud, Bali 80571
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 presale / IDR 180,000–200,000 at the door
